title: Clean Deepslate
description: Clean Deepslate removes the noisy texture of deepslate, giving it a smooth, uniform look.
body:
# Clean Deepslate

A simple resource pack that replaces the default deepslate texture with a clean, uniform version — no noise, no grain, just a flat consistent look.

## Features
- Smooth, clean deepslate texture
- Lightweight — no performance impact

## Compatibility
Supports **Minecraft Java Edition 1.17 – 1.21.1**

## Credits
by **ThePIR4TE** :)
